vocaloid-backend.name: vocaloid-backend
vocaloid-backend.description: FastAPI backend development, SQLAlchemy models, and CRUD logic. Use when adding routes, changing database models, or updating query logic in app/crud.py.

vocaloid-db.name: vocaloid-db
vocaloid-db.description: Database migrations using Alembic and schema management. Use when creating new tables or altering columns.

vocaloid-frontend.name: vocaloid-frontend
vocaloid-frontend.description: Frontend UI development with Jinja2, Tailwind CSS, and vanilla JS. Use when changing templates, editing CSS/JS assets, or improving UI.

vocaloid-git.name: vocaloid-git
vocaloid-git.description: Source control workflows, committing changes, and managing pre-commit hooks. Use when preparing a commit or pushing changes.

vocaloid-i18n.name: vocaloid-i18n
vocaloid-i18n.description: Internationalization using Babel and JS translation extraction. Use when adding translatable strings or updating locales.

vocaloid-qa.name: vocaloid-qa
vocaloid-qa.description: Testing and quality assurance with Pytest and linting. Use when running tests, fixing bugs, or verifying CI readiness.
